title: ceratostylis heterophylla
intro: Ceratostylis heterophylla, also known as the variable-leaved orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceratostylis heterophylla include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. It is prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic use.
